'''K'Sheek''' was the name of a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was abducted and raised by [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Sand People]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. The Tusken who took her was named [[Yark]], and she became a sister to [[A'Yark/Legends|A'Yark]]. She was also the wife of [[Sharad Hett]], and mother of [[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]]. Though raised by Sand People, she was not one herself; she had been brought into their tribe when she was nearly an adult, and henceforth treated as one of their own. She previously lived as a slave before the Tusken Raiders took her.<ref name="Star Wars: Kenobi" />

Not long after her son's birth, K'Sheek disappeared into a sand storm, leaving no trace.<ref name="Star Wars: Kenobi" />
